title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nodejs-packaging bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nodejs-packaging is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This package contains RPM macros and other utilities useful for packaging Node.js modules and applications in RPM-based distributions.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): nodejs-packaging: nodejs-symlink-deps doesn't handle @group/package dependencies [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121583)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for nodejs-packaging is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This package contains RPM macros and other utilities useful for packaging Node.js modules and applications in RPM-based distributions.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): nodejs-packaging: nodejs-symlink-deps doesn't handle @group/package dependencies [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121583)
